results.title: Congress Leaders Demand Investigation into Alleged Donations Misappropriation at Ayodhya Ram Temple
results.description: In a significant move, Congress leaders Rahul Gandhi and Mallikarjun Kharge have demanded an investigation into the alleged misappropriation of donations at the Ayodhya Ram Temple. They claim that millions of devotees feel cheated and are urging Prime Minister Narendra Modi to ensure accountability and transparency regarding the trust's financial dealings. The leaders emphasize the need for an independent inquiry into how donations are managed and call for the results to be made public. This controversy raises questions about the trust's governance and the government's role in ensuring the integrity of such significant religious institutions.

results.title: cjp parliament march CJP Protest illegal detention Sonam Sonam Wangchuk hunger strike
results.description: ഭയത്തിൽ നിന്നും അനീതിയിൽ നിന്നും രാജ്യത്തെ മോചിപ്പിക്കാനുള്ള സമരമാണിതെന്നും ആശുപത്രിയിൽ നിന്നുള്ള കത്തിൽ സോനം വ്യക്തമാക്കുന്നു.

results.title: President Pezeshkian urges stronger legal deterrence in Iran
results.description: TEHRAN, Jul. 19 (MNA) – President Masoud Pezeshkian called for strengthening Iran’s legal deterrence by pursuing war-related cases in domestic and international courts.

results.title: She Asked About MCA’s Deal With PAS’s Coalition, MCA Told Her To Stay Home
results.description: MCA Youth secretary-general Saw Yee Fung was told to skip the Negeri Sembilan state election after she publicly questioned why her party — which campaigned on never working with PAS — quietly agreed to share seats with PAS's coalition.
